sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 18

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 18:1
items.html:
(to the question) Bekiat Nekev beAchor Chazeh [piercing of an opening at the back of the chest]
It is known that from his root, ZA has only six vessels, which are CHaGaT NHY — the secret of the level of Bechina Aleph [the first discernment], called the five Hasadim [mercies], corresponding to the five discernments KaCHaB ZON of the Light of Chochma. The CHaGaT are discerned as the first three of the five Hasadim, that is, as a Rosh [head], and the NHY as the discernment of the Guf [body] of the five Hasadim, standing in the place of ZON of the five discernments KaCHaB ZON, as is known. Therefore, at the time of the Katnut [smallness] of ZA, while CHaGaT serve him as a Rosh, the Peh [mouth] of his Rosh is discerned at the place of the Chazeh [chest], that is, at the ending of the upper third of Tifferet. In truth, he is then discerned as a body without a Rosh, for there is no Rosh except from the discernment of the first three of Chochma. Therefore, at the completion of the building of his Partzuf — that is, after he returns his fallen AHP to his degree as at first — the CHaGaT of Katnut rise and become CHaBaD, the NHY of Katnut rise and become CHaGaT, and the new AHP that were returned to his degree become new NHY for him. With this, the building of his Partzuf is completed as it should be. Therefore ZA has no opening [Nekev] in his Chazeh, even though at the time of Katnut his Peh was there. For the whole matter of that Peh he had at the Chazeh comes from the power of the ascent of the lower Hey to the Eynaim [eyes] at the time of his Ibur [conception], when his NHY were included in CHaGaT and the lower Hey was included at the place of his Chazeh — that is, the place of the Masach [screen] and the Tzimtzum [restriction] was fixed there, and hence from there upward his ten Sefirot came out from below upward. For this reason the Chazeh is discerned as the Peh of the Rosh, being the discernment of Malchut of the Rosh, as is known. And therefore now, in Gadlut [greatness], when the lower Hey descended from the Eynaim and the AHP of the discernment of Bina returned to the building of his body, and he attained the Masach of Bechina Bet [the second discernment], that Peh of Bechina Aleph that he had at the place of the Chazeh was closed up again, for the lower Hey descended from there and came to the discernment of the Ozen [ear], as is known.
